meanings.definition: remark made spontaneously without prior preparation
examples: his ad-libs got him in trouble with the politicians
he extemporized a speech at the wedding

meanings.definition: with little or no preparation or forethought
examples: his ad-lib comments showed poor judgment
trying to sound offhanded and reassuring

meanings.definition: said or done without having been planned or written in advance
examples: he made a few ad-lib remarks
